description: Schema for study visit metadata including visit scheduling, completion status, and protocol adherence

attributes.name: subject_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the study subject/participant

attributes.name: visit_number
attributes.description: Sequential visit number for the study

attributes.name: visit_name
attributes.description: Name or label for this visit type

attributes.name: scheduled_date
attributes.description: Date when visit was scheduled to occur

validValues.description: Visit is scheduled but not yet completed
Visit occurred but some procedures were not completed
Subject did not attend scheduled visit

attributes.name: visit_window_start
attributes.description: Start date of acceptable visit window

attributes.name: visit_window_end
attributes.description: End date of acceptable visit window

attributes.name: protocol_deviation
attributes.description: Whether any protocol deviations occurred during visit

attributes.name: deviation_description
attributes.description: Description of protocol deviation if applicable
examples: Blood draw occurred 15 minutes outside window
Subject ate breakfast before fasting blood draw

attributes.name: assessments_completed
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of assessments completed at this visit

attributes.name: site_id
attributes.description: Identifier for the clinical site where visit occurred

attributes.name: visit_duration_minutes
attributes.description: Total duration of visit in minutes

attributes.name: coordinator_initials
attributes.description: Initials of study coordinator who conducted visit
